title: croton chodatii
intro: Croton chodatii, also known as Vietnamese croton, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is traditionally used in Vietnamese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Croton chodatii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations of Croton chodatii are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
